finding: Cause: hemodynamic stress + repeated endothelial damage ← turbulent blood flow

differentials.name: by CT: detection rate of aneurysms at pCom
differentials.raw: by CT: detection rate of aneurysms at pCom (40%), aCom / MCA, basilar artery (80%)

differentials.name: by angiography
differentials.raw: by angiography (= symptomatic aneurysms): pCom (38%) > aCom (36%) > MCA bifurcation (21%) > ICA bifurcation > tip of basilar artery (2.8%)

differentials.name: by risk of bleeding: 1-2% per year aCom (70% bleed), pCom (2nd highest risk) ◊  Aneurysms at bifurcations / branching points are at greatest risk for rupture!
differentials.raw: by risk of bleeding: 1-2% per year aCom (70% bleed), pCom (2nd highest risk) ◊  Aneurysms at bifurcations / branching points are at greatest risk for rupture!

differentials.name: Death in 10% within 24 hours from concomitant intracerebral hemorrhage, extensive brain herniation, massive infarcts + hemorrhage within brainstem
differentials.raw: Death in 10% within 24 hours from concomitant intracerebral hemorrhage, extensive brain herniation, massive infarcts + hemorrhage within brainstem

differentials.name: Rebleeding rate: 12-20% within 2 weeks, 11-22% within 30 days, up to 50% within 6 months (increased mortality); thereafter 1-2-4% risk/year

differentials.name: visual disturbance; cranial nerve palsy; seizure
differentials.raw: visual disturbance; cranial nerve palsy; seizure

context: Site:   circle of Willis (COW) in 90-95%, arterial bifurcation in 5-10% Location:   anterior circulation (90%), posterior circulation (10%), distal to COW (5%) Size:   2-3 mm small to giant >2.5 cm Cause:   predominantly atherosclerotic degeneration Location:   posterior circulation (a)  Serpentine =  partly thrombosed containing tortuous vascular channels Cause:   recurrent cycles of thrombosis + recanalization within fusiform aneurysm Location of aneurysm: (a)  circle of Willis (85%): aCom (25%), pCom (18%), MCA bifurcation (25%), distal ACA (5%), ICA at bifurcation (4%), ophthalmic a. (4%),
